'''''Hoopaju''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], while carrying weapons, it was caught by the [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}

[[Category:GR-75 medium transports]]
[[Category:Starships of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
